featuredRelease.title: Let My People Go
featuredRelease.lyrics:
Go DOWN, Moses!
Burn through Egypt’s gates,
Pharaoh’s throne is shaking,
Cause freedom’s on its way!

Chains on the innocent,
Crushed in a starving land,
Israel crying out,
No strength left to stand.
Oppression on their backs,
The fire in their bones,
God heard every tear,
And thunder shook the throne!

A whisper turned to a roar,
A calling carved into stone…

Go down, Moses!
Deep into the darkness, stand!
Face that Pharaoh,
Say the word of Heaven’s command!
Go down, Moses,
Break the yoke and shatter the hold!
Tell that tyrant,
GOD says let My people GO!

Moses stepped in unafraid,
Storm in his spirit rose,
Spoke the Name of Yahweh,
And shook the earth below.
Pharaoh with a hardened heart,
Defiant in his pride,
But judgment like a tidal wave
Was rolling in the sky!

A whisper turned to a roar,
A calling carved into stone…

Go down, Moses!
Deep into the darkness, stand!
Face that Pharaoh,
Say the word of Heaven’s command!
Go down, Moses,
Break the yoke and shatter the hold!
Tell that tyrant,
GOD says let My people GO!

LET… THEM… GO!
(Tremble, Pharaoh, your kingdom’s falling)
LET… THEM… GO!
(The chains you forged are breaking open)
LET… THEM… GO!
(Yahweh’s voice is thunder spoken)
LET MY PEOPLE GO!

Go down, Moses!
Stand where warriors never stand,
Speak the freedom
Written by the Lord’s own hand!
Go down, Moses,
Break the chains and lift the low!
Tell that tyrant,
GOD says LET MY PEOPLE GO!
featuredRelease.songMeaning:
A cry that shook a nation. A command that broke chains.

God saw the suffering. God heard the cries. He sent one man straight into the center of power with a message no king could ignore. Barefoot. Stuttering. Wanted for murder. Walked right into the throne room of the most powerful empire on earth.

“Let My people go.”

That was not a request. That was Heaven breaking in.

We wrote this because that story is not old. There are still Pharaohs. Still systems. Still chains. And God is still the One who hears every cry, counts every brick, and decides when it ends.

If you feel held down, held back, or held captive, pay attention.

📖 Scripture Behind the Song
Exodus 3:7-10 · Exodus 5:1 · Exodus 6:6 · Exodus 12:31
Psalm 34:17 · John 8:36

🔔 Subscribe. Or don’t. We’re still releasing.
🌐 https://shieldbearerusa.com
📤 Share it if it matters to you.

#LetMyPeopleGo #Shieldbearer #ChristianMusic #Moses #Exodus #FaithMusic #HeavyWorship

signal.title: My Neighbors Are Listening to Metal Tonight (Whether They Like It or Not)
For an AI Band… We Have Way Too Much Guitar Gear
The Man
signal.lyrics:
[Verse]
And you will hear
Of wars
And rumors of wars
[Matthew 24:6]
See that you are not troubled
For all these things must come to pass
But the end is not yet
[Matthew 24:6]
Nation will rise against nation
Kingdom against kingdom
[Matthew 24:7]
Famines
Pestilences
Earthquakes
In various places
[Matthew 24:7]
All these
Are the beginning
Of sorrows
[Matthew 24:8]
When the Man comes around
[Verse]
There will be signs
In the sun
In the moon
In the stars
[Luke 21:25]
On the earth
Distress of nations
With perplexity
[Luke 21:25]
The sea
And the waves
Roaring
[Luke 21:25]
Men’s hearts failing them
From fear
From expectation
[Luke 21:26]
Of those things
Which are coming
On the earth
[Luke 21:26]
For the powers
Of the heavens
Will be shaken
[Luke 21:26]
When the Man comes around
[Pre-Chorus]
Watch therefore
You do not know
What hour
Your Lord is coming
[Matthew 24:42]
When the Man comes around
[Chorus]
When the Man
When the Man
When the Man comes around
Behold
He is coming
With clouds
[Revelation 1:7]
Every eye
Will see Him
[Revelation 1:7]
When the Man
When the Man
When the Man comes around
[Verse]
Jerusalem
Will be trampled
By Gentiles
[Luke 21:24]
Until the times
Of the Gentiles
Are fulfilled
[Luke 21:24]
Blindness in part
Has happened
To Israel
[Romans 11:25]
Until the fullness
Of the Gentiles
Has come in
[Romans 11:25]
When the Man comes around
[Section]
When
The
Man
When
The
Man
The day of the Lord
Will come
As a thief
In the night
[2 Peter 3:10]
The heavens
Will pass away
With a great noise
[2 Peter 3:10]
The elements
Will melt
With fervent heat
[2 Peter 3:10]
The earth
And the works
That are in it
Will be burned up
[2 Peter 3:10]
It is a fearful thing
To fall
Into the hands
Of the living God
[Hebrews 10:31]
When the Man comes around
[Chorus]
When the Man
When the Man
When the Man comes around
The kingdoms
Of this world
Have become
The kingdoms
Of our Lord
And of His Christ
[Revelation 11:15]
He shall reign
Forever
And ever
[Revelation 11:15]
When the Man comes around
[Outro]
I am
The Alpha
And the Omega
[Revelation 22:13]
The Beginning
And the End
[Revelation 22:13]
The First
And the Last
[Revelation 22:13]
Surely
I am coming
Quickly
[Revelation 22:20]
Amen
Even so
Come
Lord Jesus
[Revelation 22:20]

signal.title: Afraid to Say His Name?
signal.lyrics:
Iron dust and canyoned scars
Frozen ground from ancient wars
Dry river veins stretched far
The wounded red of Mars
Endless storms of rolling thunder
Clouds that tear the dark asunder
Gravity that drags us under
The burning giant Jupiter
Orbits lock
Pressure climbs
Mass obeys
Curves of time
Galilean
Lord of flame
Before the stars
You bore the Name
Galilean
Christ alone
Darkness breaks
The void is torn
A sun implodes and leaves a scar
Its burning shell is ripped apart
Matter crushed beyond the far
The shattered core, neutron star
A spiral flood of burning rays
A hundred billion suns ablaze
We drift within its ancient sway
The endless wheel, Milky Way
Light departs
Still arrives
Ages pass
Before our eyes
Galilean
Lord of flame
Before the stars
You bore the Name
Galilean
Christ alone
Darkness breaks
The void is torn
Stars ignite
Stars decay
Light arrives
Far too late
Worlds collapse
Time is torn
Ash remains
Where fire was born
Galilean
King of all
When stars collapse
And heavens fall
Galilean
End and start
All creation
Bears Your mark
Fire fades from every sky
Night stands bare before the dawn
What was made will pass and die
Jesus reigns
The Galilean

signal.title: RUACH
signal.lyrics:
Master, we proclaim You, sovereign over all
By Your breath the void surrendered and the silent depths were called
When the final trumpet tears the heavens from the sky
Every nation sees the scars of the Lamb who rose to life
Evil hunts my footsteps, flesh is drawn toward the fall
RUACH, drive the dark away, let no deceit remain at all
You who scattered legions with the thunder of Your word
You who left the heights of glory for redemption undeserved
If Your people go to silence, then the stones awake and cry
Earth itself erupts in witness to the King enthroned on high
Mountains quake with reverence, oceans echo Your decree
All creation answers back with a truth no soul can flee
RUACH, shake the ages
Let the firmament awake
If the stones erupt in thunder
Then ignite my very frame
RUACH, shake the ages
All You fashioned bow and see
When the cosmos roars allegiance
The one who cries is me
Where no shadow ever reaches, that is where my soul will rise
Where the everlasting brightness burns, I stand before Your eyes
Hosts of blazing warriors wait the whisper of Your will
And with their ranks unending I will praise You standing still
Lord of Lords, Your lifeblood fell and broke the captive chain
Then You rose in power conquering the darkness and its reign
Tyrant night was shattered when You called the sleepers free
Master, I surrender, I fall prostrate at Your feet
RUACH moving, judgment waking
Night collapsing, strongholds breaking
Earth responding, fire ascending
Every knee to You bending
RUACH, shake the ages
Let the firmament awake
If the stones erupt in thunder
Then ignite my very frame
RUACH, shake the ages
All You fashioned bow and see
When the final roar is spoken
The one who cries is me

signal.title: Star, Scepter (Christian metal based on Numbers 24)
Tidings of Comfort and Joy (God Rest Ye Merry Gentlemen) [Metal Christmas Anthem]
signal.lyrics:
Hark now, all who seek the Light,
Lift up your hearts and hear,
For Christ the Lord, Redeemer come,
Has silenced doubt and fear;
He breaks the chains that bound the night,
And draws salvation near.
Glad tidings of comfort and of joy,
Comfort and joy!
Glad tidings of comfort and of joy!
In Bethlehem of Judah,
This holy Child was born,
And laid within a manger
Upon that blessed morn;
His mother, pure and faithful,
Beheld her Son new-born.
Glad tidings of comfort and of joy,
Comfort and joy!
Glad tidings of comfort and of joy!
From God, our loving Father,
An angel bright was sent,
To shepherds in the fields by night,
With Heaven’s message meant:
That Christ the Lord, the promised One,
To Earth in mercy went.
Glad tidings of comfort and of joy,
Comfort and joy!
Glad tidings of comfort and of joy!
"Fear not," declared the angel voice,
"Let nothing bring dismay,
For born to you a Savior comes,
The Light, the Truth, the Way;
To free all souls who trust in Him
From darkness and decay."
Glad tidings of comfort and of joy,
Comfort and joy!
Glad tidings of comfort and of joy!
The shepherds at that holy word
Rejoiced with hearts aflame,
They left their flocks in tempest winds
And to the city came,
To find the Babe of prophecy,
And praise His holy name.
Glad tidings of comfort and of joy,
Comfort and joy!
Glad tidings of comfort and of joy!
When they beheld the Holy Child,
Where humble oxen fed,
They bowed in awe and worshipped there,
Before His lowly bed;
And Mary softly lifted praise
To God who sent her Bread.
Glad tidings of comfort and of joy,
Comfort and joy!
Glad tidings of comfort and of joy!
Now raise your songs and praises high,
All hearts within this place,
With love that binds the brotherhood,
And peace that crowns His grace;
This holy time of Christmas shines,
With heaven’s bright embrace.
Glad tidings of comfort and of joy,
Comfort and joy!
Glad tidings of comfort and of joy!

signal.title: Broken Helicopter – A Father’s Song
signal.lyrics:
You brought it to me with tearful eyes,
Rotor blades bent, it wouldn’t fly.
You held it out with hope so wide,
“Dada, can you fix it, just like last time?”
Your hands were small, your heart was sure,
That I could mend what broke for sure.
I took that toy and held it tight,
Promised I’d make it soar by night.
But time flies faster than toys can spin,
And I can’t fix everything with tools and tin.
You’re taller now, your voice has changed,
But I still hear that boy’s sweet name,
“Dada…” echoing down the hall.
And I’d still fix it all, if I could fix it all.
Now your battles aren’t with blades and glue,
They're on a field with goals in view.
You say, “Dada, help me with my shot,”
Same little heart, just a different plot.
I cheer you on, I mark the plays,
I pass the ball, recall those days.
From broken toys to goals you chase,
You still look up, and I take my place.
'Cause time flies faster than toys can spin,
And I can’t fix everything with tools and tin.
You're finding heights I’ll never see,
But you’ll always be that boy to me.
When life breaks down or dreams just stall,
I’ll still fix what I can, I’ll still catch your fall.
Some things you learn to fix alone,
Some dreams you chase beyond our home.
But if you crash, if you descend,
Know my love won’t ever bend.
Time flies faster than we believe,
And not all wounds will ask to leave.
But I’d trade the world to hear you say,
“Hey Dada, can you help today?”
No matter how the pieces fall,
I'll still fix what I can, if I can fix it all.
You once brought me a broken toy,
Now you're the man, but still my boy.

signal.title: Unaliving the Giant (Official Christian Metal Release)
signal.lyrics:
The valley waits beneath the haze,
Heatline ghosts in the sun’s red gaze.
A giant laughs, his challenge thrown,
He dares the God I’ve always known.
My hands still quake, the ground resounds,
A tremor rolls through sacred ground.
The paw was crushed, the claw was torn,
The same right hand will strike once more.
You trust your height, your blade, your name,
I walk beside the One untamed.
Your crown hits the dust as Skull Meets Stone,
Your crown hits the dust as Skull Meets Stone.
Fall to the ground, your name dethroned,
Your crown hits the dust as Skull Meets Stone.
The ranks hold breath, the moment bends,
Each heartbeat counts, the stillness ends.
The cord swings wide, the line is cast,
The air divides, the die is passed.
His grin decays, the watchers stare,
A single sound cuts through the air.
The cord releases, the world convicts,
The ground remembers what it hits.
You trust your height, your blade, your name,
I walk beside the One untamed.
Your crown hits the dust as Skull Meets Stone,
Your crown hits the dust as Skull Meets Stone.
Fall to the ground, your name dethroned,
Your crown hits the dust as Skull Meets Stone.
Stone to skull, the pride erased,
The tyrant falls, the field retraced.
Raise your voice, let every line,
Unalive the giant, this field is mine.
The ranks surge forward, the nations know,
The Lord of Hosts has struck His blow.
The ground still hums where giants bled,
The call resounds, the Word was said.
The breath of God through dust and bone,
The field belongs to Him alone.
Your crown hits the dust as Skull Meets Stone,
Your crown hits the dust as Skull Meets Stone.
Fall to the ground, your name dethroned,
Your crown hits the dust as Skull Meets Stone.
The giant’s fallen, his name undone,
Unalive the giant, the field is won.
The dust drifts slow, the earth has known,
The day was His as Skull Meets Stone.

signal.title: Gut Punch [Official Song Release]
signal.lyrics:
August twenty-second on that Blue Line train,
She carried the heartache from the war in Ukraine.
She thought she’d find freedom in the land of the free,
But she bled on that train till that last heartbeat.
Our nation breaks and our hope lies crushed,
Life knocked us down with a gut punch.
Through all the hurt, are You here holding us?
We run into Your arms, run into Your arms Jesus.
Charlie’s gone, gunned down in Utah,
Blood on the ground, saw it on a livestream.
Do we still have that freedom of speech,
Wondered what happened to the American dream.
Our nation breaks and our hope lies crushed,
It hit to the heart like a gut punch.
Through all the hurt, will You keep holding us?
We run into Your arms, run into Your arms Jesus.
In DC they light candles on the Hill,
Hearts are broken but still holding vigil.
From power halls to the common street,
We bow our heads where Your mercy meets.
Fear and anger fill the nightly news,
Candace smirks and blames it on the Jews.
Pointing fingers while the nation bleeds,
We’re crying out for the truth we need.
Our nation breaks and our hope lies crushed,
It hit to the heart like a gut punch.
Through all the hurt, will You keep holding us?
We run into Your arms, run into Your arms Jesus.
These broken strings still cry from my guitar,
I’ll scream Your name till the morning breaks the dark.
With heavy hearts through all that grieves us,
We run into Your arms, run into Your arms Jesus.

signal.title: Over the Skies of Hell (Official Lyric Video)
signal.lyrics:
Flames rose high in the dragon’s den,
Chains were clamped on the souls of men.
Darkness laughed at the world He made,
But the sky was split and the grave betrayed.
He walked through ash and fire’s breath,
He shattered hell, He silenced death.
With fury and light in His burning strides,
He storms the realm where the serpent hides.
The chains all snapped with a single word,
His roar the last that hell ever heard.
Now crowned in flame and clothed in might,
He rides… over the skies of hell.
The keys He claimed from Satan’s grip,
The throne of lies began to slip.
He rose with power none could quell,
King of Heaven, Slayer of Hell.
No demon stood, no gate remained,
His voice alone unmade the flame.
With fury and light in His burning strides,
He storms the realm where the serpent hides.
The chains all snapped with a single word,
His roar the last that hell ever heard.
Now crowned in flame and clothed in might,
He rides… over the skies of hell.
He took their sting, He burned the scroll,
He stormed the dark to save my soul.
He rides on flame with stars in tow,
He speaks and kingdoms rise or bow.
His robe is drenched in holy war,
His voice, the flood, the lion’s roar.
The grave lies torn beneath His will,
He reigns over the skies of hell.
Over the skies of hell,
Over the skies of hell,
Over the skies of hell,
Over the skies of hell.

signal.title: He Found His Voice
signal.lyrics:
They told us you might see the world through colors we can’t always name.
You lined up toys instead of words, but we loved you just the same.
You did not speak like others did, but oh, your eyes told a tale.
So we held on, we prayed and hoped, and followed every little trail.
And now you're counting stars in class, solving puzzles, moving fast.
You are the quiet storm that broke through noise, my boy, my joy… he found his voice.
To every teacher who helped him rise, you saw the spark behind his eyes.
You changed a world with gentle choice, thank you… he found his voice.
There were days he would sit in silence still, while others laughed and ran ahead.
But now he races to the board, with numbers dancing in his head.
He is not defined by any chart, he has a wild and brilliant heart.
The boy who once just smiled and waved is standing tall, no need to be saved.
And now he's counting stars in class, solving puzzles, moving fast.
You are the quiet storm that broke through noise, my boy, my joy… he found his voice.
To every guide who took his hand, you helped us truly understand.
With every sound and every choice, thank you… he found his voice.
Speech was once a distant dream, now he sings and builds and beams.
And though the journey is far from done, he is rising like the morning sun.
Now he is counting stars in class, leads the charge, not in the past.
The label is gone, it is just pure choice, my son, my light… he found his voice.
To the hearts who saw his hidden flame, you loved the boy, not just the name.
You helped him sing without the noise, thank you… he found his voice.
We once heard silence, now we hear song.
He found his voice, where it belonged.

signal.title: QUAKE (Christian Metal
signal.lyrics:
Low growl in the ground, I hear your walls break
Name on my lips, and the night starts to quake
Your banners burn where you claimed the streets
Your captives run as they hear His feet
No courtroom trial, the verdict’s screamed
The Word made flesh rips apart your schemes
Ash on the air, your fortress shakes
The sky cracks open, and the earth awakes
QUAKE, when the Name cuts through the haze
QUAKE, every shadow splits in blaze
Your crown falls, your strongholds break
JESUS JESUS JESUS, you quake
Your venom’s dry, your claws turn dust
Every curse you wrote just turns to rust
The Lamb stands crowned where you thought Him slain
He steps through fire, and He calls your name
Ash on the air, your fortress shakes
The sky cracks open, and the earth awakes
QUAKE, when the Name cuts through the haze
QUAKE, every shadow splits in blaze
Your crown falls, your strongholds break
JESUS JESUS JESUS, you quake
Bow down (QUAKE)
Spit out the lies (QUAKE)
Your kingdom cracks under holy eyes (QUAKE)
The grave lies empty, the risen Christ (QUAKE)
QUAKE, QUAKE
Name of JESUS makes you QUAKE
QUAKE, when the Name cuts through the haze
QUAKE, every shadow splits in blaze
Your crown falls, your strongholds break
JESUS JESUS JESUS, you quake
Night goes silent when the demons quake

released.title: Let My People Go
released.lyrics:
Go DOWN, Moses!
Burn through Egypt’s gates,
Pharaoh’s throne is shaking,
Cause freedom’s on its way!

Chains on the innocent,
Crushed in a starving land,
Israel crying out,
No strength left to stand.
Oppression on their backs,
The fire in their bones,
God heard every tear,
And thunder shook the throne!

A whisper turned to a roar,
A calling carved into stone…

Go down, Moses!
Deep into the darkness, stand!
Face that Pharaoh,
Say the word of Heaven’s command!
Go down, Moses,
Break the yoke and shatter the hold!
Tell that tyrant,
GOD says let My people GO!

Moses stepped in unafraid,
Storm in his spirit rose,
Spoke the Name of Yahweh,
And shook the earth below.
Pharaoh with a hardened heart,
Defiant in his pride,
But judgment like a tidal wave
Was rolling in the sky!

A whisper turned to a roar,
A calling carved into stone…

Go down, Moses!
Deep into the darkness, stand!
Face that Pharaoh,
Say the word of Heaven’s command!
Go down, Moses,
Break the yoke and shatter the hold!
Tell that tyrant,
GOD says let My people GO!

LET… THEM… GO!
(Tremble, Pharaoh, your kingdom’s falling)
LET… THEM… GO!
(The chains you forged are breaking open)
LET… THEM… GO!
(Yahweh’s voice is thunder spoken)
LET MY PEOPLE GO!

Go down, Moses!
Stand where warriors never stand,
Speak the freedom
Written by the Lord’s own hand!
Go down, Moses,
Break the chains and lift the low!
Tell that tyrant,
GOD says LET MY PEOPLE GO!
released.songMeaning:
A cry that shook a nation. A command that broke chains.

God saw the suffering. God heard the cries. He sent one man straight into the center of power with a message no king could ignore. Barefoot. Stuttering. Wanted for murder. Walked right into the throne room of the most powerful empire on earth.

“Let My people go.”

That was not a request. That was Heaven breaking in.

We wrote this because that story is not old. There are still Pharaohs. Still systems. Still chains. And God is still the One who hears every cry, counts every brick, and decides when it ends.

If you feel held down, held back, or held captive, pay attention.

📖 Scripture Behind the Song
Exodus 3:7-10 · Exodus 5:1 · Exodus 6:6 · Exodus 12:31
Psalm 34:17 · John 8:36

🔔 Subscribe. Or don’t. We’re still releasing.
🌐 https://shieldbearerusa.com
📤 Share it if it matters to you.

#LetMyPeopleGo #Shieldbearer #ChristianMusic #Moses #Exodus #FaithMusic #HeavyWorship
